summary: Search and SearchByType wrap the user query as an FTS5 phrase via quoteFTS5Phrase so titles with special chars (parens, *, internal double quotes, OR/AND tokens) don't crash report dedupe / submit.
reason: FTS5 MATCH parses the right operand as a query expression; passing raw user-supplied title+asset+cwe text propagated SQL parse errors as hard failures through reportDedupeCollisions. Phrase-wrap is the safe default for the dedupe and search paths in this CLI (titles are sequences, not boolean expressions). Greptile P1 on PR #459.
validated_outcome: New TestSearchByType_FTS5SpecialCharsNoCrash exercises 6 previously-crashing inputs (unbalanced parens, internal quotes, bare *, OR/AND keywords) and confirms each returns without error.
